description: Mesari Production is your trusted partner for high-quality custom apparel and clothing production. We specialize in creating custom t-shirts, uniforms, and various apparel products tailored to your needs. With quality materials and skilled craftsmanship, we help bring your ideas and brand to life through reliable and professional garment production services.
address: Perum BCA Pesona Jadi, Blok 6.C No.06, Banjar Anyar, Kediri, Tabanan Regency, Bali 82123
